nodes.title: 测试节点
nodes.latex:
$$\text{test} \ \int \hat{\vec{\mathcal{L}}^{2^{2_2a}}_\pi} \ \frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{d}y} \ \ \Delta \ \Delta x (\alpha_1) \epsilon' e^{-E/kT} e_1 \partial t$$

$$\mathcal{Z}_{eff}^{(n)}[\phi] = \oint_{\partial \Omega} \sqrt{-g} \cdot e^{-\frac{i}{\hbar} \int_{t_0}^{t_1} \left[ \frac{1}{2} m \left( \frac{\mathrm{d}^2 \vec{x}_a}{\mathrm{d}s^2} \right)^2 - V(x_a, \dot{x}_a, \vec{p}^{(i)}) \right] \mathrm{d}s} \cdot \frac{\delta^2 S}{\delta \phi^* \delta \phi}$$

$$\mathbb{W}_{ext} = \int \mathrm{d}^4x \left\{ \bar{\psi}_{\alpha} (i \gamma^{\mu} \nabla_{\mu} - m) \psi^{\alpha} + \sum_{j=1}^{N} \det \left( \begin{matrix} \hat{A}_{ij} & \delta_{ij} \Phi \\ \Phi^{\dagger} & \partial^2 \hat{B}_{ij} \end{matrix} \right) \right\} + \Delta \mathcal{L}_{int}$$

## 1

$$\chi_{i j}^{(3)}(\omega_p; \omega_1, \omega_2) = \frac{N e^4}{\epsilon_0 \hbar^3} \sum_{a,b,c} \frac{\rho_{aa}^{(0)} - \rho_{bb}^{(0)}}{(\omega_{ba} - \omega_1 - i\Gamma_{ba}) (\omega_{ca} - \omega_p - i\Gamma_{ca})} \hat{r}_{ab} \hat{r}_{bc} \hat{r}_{ca}$$
